Notes: UWP gets 23 points from Wellnitz, including 15 in the second half...UWP's
Henry tallies 17 points and seven rebounds...UWO gets career highs of 21
points from Kitzke, 13 from Conroy and 12 from Paisar...UWP jumps to 14-3 lead
...Tied at 54, UWP goes on 12-4 run to take 66-58 lead with 39 seconds left.
Game.Officials: Brian Kenney,  Wesley Porter,  Mark Repinski
